title: Sample Request for Proposals (RFP) for Project Management Services
expected_content_elements: Compliance references to HOME/HTF or similar programs
key_details: RFP issued by a government housing authority for project management services on a HOME/HTF-funded housing project.
Describes responsibilities such as grant administration, compliance reporting, procurement support, progress reporting, and project close-out.
Clarifies that fees will be paid from grant funds and that some responsibilities (e.g., legal advice, audits, disbursal of funds) are explicitly excluded.
layout_features: Numbered lists for services and tasks
Section headers in uppercase or bold (e.g. BACKGROUND, SCOPE OF SERVICES)
images_and_diagrams_description: No significant figures. At most a simple letterhead or logo at the top; otherwise plain text.
tables_description: No formal tables. Structured content is encoded as numbered or bulleted lists.
extraction_checklist: Did the extractor correctly identify the RFP title and issuing agency?
Are all numbered services/tasks preserved in order and not merged or split incorrectly?
Are section headers (e.g., PURPOSE, SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED, PROPOSAL SUBMISSION) captured as headings?
Is grant/program-specific language (e.g., HOME/HTF, references to state manuals) captured without corruption?
Is there any loss or duplication of content due to page headers/footers?
